gh_bb025dc75f8639bdc7ca7a40.title: [São Paulo] Tech Fast Track - Vagas em Front-End na Tractian
gh_bb025dc75f8639bdc7ca7a40.description:
## Nossa empresa

Fundada em 2019 por três estudantes universitários: Igor Marinelli, Gabriel Lameirinhas e Leonardo Vieira. A Tractian nasceu com o propósito de transforma a indústria por meio da tecnologia e rapidamente se tornou uma empresa global de tecnologia industrial.

Combinamos sensores inteligentes, software e IA para monitorar milhares de ativos em tempo real, reduzir paradas não planejadas e manter fábricas operando em máxima performance.

## Descrição da vaga

Processo seletivo sem limite de vagas para Software Engineering, Hardware e Data Science, com salário inicial de R$ 12.000 a R$ 21.000, variando conforme seu nível e escopo.  

**Escolha sua trilha de preferência**
Você pode se inscrever em uma trilha e, se fizer sentido, a Tractian te realoca durante o processo.  

**Trilha 1 - Software Engineering**
Construa produtos fluidos e intuitivos. Sua missão é elevar a performance de nossas plataformas mobile e desktop, unindo código limpo à usabilidade impecável.  

**Trilha 2 - Hardware**
Domine o ciclo completo do produto. Do firmware e circuitos ao design externo e manufatura. Garanta hardware robusto, escalável e com alta confiabilidade.  

**Trilha 3 - Data Science & AI**
Coloque IA e Machine Learning em produção. Transforme dados em diagnósticos inteligentes e antecipe problemas. Construa fluxos e infraestrutura de alta performance para integrar produtos em ecossistemas complexos. 

   

**Salário inicial: entre R$ 12.000 e R$ 21.000**
- A faixa acima é o salário inicial para este programa.
- O valor final depende principalmente de nível (pleno/sênior/especialista) e escopo da função (complexidade, autonomia, impacto esperado).
- Durante o processo, você recebe uma proposta compatível com sua avaliação.
- Até $40,000 USD de equity inicial da empresa de tecnologia que mais cresce no Brasil.    

## Local

- [Hardware] Disponibilidade para trabalhar no modelo híbrido, baseado em São Paulo - SP.
- [Software e Data Science & AI] Formato de trabalho pode ser híbrido ou remoto.

## Requisitos
- Senioridade mínima: pleno.
- Disponibilidade para início a partir de abril de 2026.
- Graduação completa em cursos de tecnologia será um diferencial.


## Benefícios

- Plano de saúde e odontológico sem coparticipação
- R$ 1.035/mês de vale alimentação/refeição
- Acesso ao Wellhub
- Incentivo adicional de R$ 300/mês para práticas esportivas
- Viagem internacional a cada 4 anos para o destino de sua escolha
- NVIDIA GB300 à sua disposição: Acesso físico exclusivo às GPUs mais potentes do mercado. A única infraestrutura deste porte em toda a América Latina.

## Contratação

CLT

## Como se candidatar

Inscreva-se até 09/03:
https://careers.tractian.com/fast-track-program-2026?utm_source=github&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=fast-track-2026&utm_content=frontend

## Tempo médio de feedbacks

O processo seguirá o fluxo definido previamente e todos os candidatos receberão um retorno ao fim de cada etapa.

- Inscrição até 09/03
- Desafio Técnico (online) 11 a 15/03
- Final Presencial em 28 e 29/03
- Contratação para início em abril  

## Labels
<!-- retire os labels que não fazem sentido à vaga -->

#### Alocação
- Remoto 
- Híbrido 

#### Regime
- CLT

#### Nível
- Pleno
- Sênior
- Especialista

gh_bb48358b6dad443eeb12b358.title: [Remote] FullStack Developer - Shaw and Partners
gh_bb48358b6dad443eeb12b358.description:
**Who we are and what we do**
Shaw and Partners is a software development provider for high-profile startups with approximately 25 remote staff. We are also incubating two startups. [Christopher Shaw](https://chrisshaw.me/), the founder and CEO, would be your manager. 

**Engineering at Shaw and Partners**

Our clients have funded U.S. startups in LA and NY, so depending on your location, you may need to participate in a late call, but you can set your own schedule.

We’re all here to serve each other. Each team is held in high regard, resulting in camaraderie and support. We also enjoy the freedom to test new technologies using POCs at appropriate intervals. This requires a balanced healthy mindset supported from the top.

We are looking for full-stack developers and accept developers with a stronger focus on either front-end or **back-end.**

**Responsibilities** 

- Design, build, and maintain efficient, reusable, and reliable code
- Ensure the best possible performance, quality, and responsiveness of the applications
- Identify and track bottlenecks and bugs, and devise solutions to these problems
- Help maintain code quality, organization, and internal standards

**Local: 100% remote**

**Required** 

- **English (Fluency in reading and writing, speaking can be intermediate)**
- Frustrated with poorly structured, inefficient, and unmaintainable code
- Experience with testing frameworks, building backend APIs and user-centric frontends
- Solid Computer Science fundamentals knowledge (algorithms, data structures, concurrency, etc.)
Sr. > 5+ years in digital product development on a team of engineers, ideally using **NodeJS**
Mid-Level > 3+ years in digital product development on a team of engineers, ideally using NodeJS
Jr. > 1+ years in digital product development on a team of engineers, ideally using NodeJS 

**Differentials** 

- Strong experience and interest in working with Kubernetes, Amazon Web Services, Google Cloud Platform
- Experience with React, TypeScript, Next, and Responsive Web Design, state management patterns and solutions (e.g. Redux) ES2015+, HTML5 APIs and CSS3
- Working experience in Continuous Integration/Deployment
- B.Sc. degree or equivalent in Computer Science or Software Engineering 

**We offer** 

- Fully remote work / geographically distributed team
- Flexible schedule (respond promptly, attend meetings, meet deadlines)
- Long-term contract
- Discretionary equity as an early team member 
- Competitive salary in USD + bonuses
- Fast selection process

**B2B contract - PJ.** 

Full-time = 176h per month 
You manage you time!

Discover more at https://shawandpartners.com/opt/?jobId=11
Not a suitable vacancy? Check out other vacancies on our website

gh_bb95e71939c1d64baec9b52c.title: Mara Blockchain 徵才 -【全職 Senior Solidity Engineer】
gh_bb95e71939c1d64baec9b52c.description:
## 團隊簡介
Mara Chain，是非洲加密經濟的門戶。
Ｍara 是 10 億非洲人通過基於信任和教育的產品積累數字財富的平台。Ｍara 提供真正的非洲製造且符合監管要求的加密產品套件，通過這些產品，Ｍara 的用戶將找到他們在金融和創業解決方案中一直尋求的易用性、可靠性和透明度。
透過 Ｍara 將創造金融可能性新世界的熱情與尖端技術和最優秀的人才融為一體。

## 地點
遠端

## 工作內容
作為一個Cosmos SDK開發的Layer 1區塊鏈的高級 Solidity Web3 工程師，您將有獨特的機會提供面向 Web3 用戶的組件，其中包括瀏覽器、驗證器、質押頁面、智能合約、自託管品牌加密錢包、用於驗證器的代幣水龍頭、跨鏈橋和交換前端。 您將生成與 JSON-RPC 和 Cosmos 區塊鏈 API 以及 Solidity 合約進行通信的 Web 前端應用程式和頁面。
該職位將負責分析、確定範圍、設計、開發和測試網的鏈式工程 Web3 應用程式，並集成其他區塊鏈後端 API 和組件(即橋接器)。

## 能力需求
• 至少 2 年前端 Web 開發和相關工具鏈，即 React、Cypress、Jest、Enzyme。
• 至少 1 年專業 Solidity、Web3 經驗以及相關現代框架和程式語言庫，即 Hardhat、OpenZeppelin。
• 具智能合約安全審計經驗。
• 安全第一的心態。
• 能夠制定高效、安全、優質且經過充分測試的 Solidity 智能合約。
• 久經考驗的為Web3 應用程序和Dapp 生成測試套件的能力。
• 能夠獨立運作，並在 Jira 和 Confluence 中按照最高質量標準成功確定範圍、分析、實施、記錄和報告工作方面擁有良好的記錄。

### 加分
開發過Layer1區塊鏈經驗

## 薪資範圍
• 有競爭力的薪資和豐厚的福利待遇——並搭配公司股權和未來代幣權利

## 福利/ 特休
• 無限制的年假——以結果為導向的企業。
• 提供就職者及其家屬全面的健康保險
• 完整的產假/陪產假

## 聯絡方式
Peco@rbcap.io

gh_bb3fa49952e4dd6fc100f8ba.title: 🔥 [資深] 3.5M/Y iOS/Android 軟體工程師 (全遠端) 🛠 Senior Mobile App Engineer (Remote) 🚀
gh_bb3fa49952e4dd6fc100f8ba.description:
## **About Us**

We are a **rapidly growing software technology startup** from Silicon Valley, founded by top engineers from Stanford and MIT. Our dynamic team brings together extensive experience and diverse backgrounds in finance and consulting from New York, San Francisco, and Chicago. As a fully remote company, we offer a unique opportunity for exceptional individuals to join our team. We foster a culture that values both practicality and creativity, providing an meritocratic environment for you to showcase your skills and contribute to the creation of innovative products.

Are you seeking a company that transcends traditional constraints of location and time?

If you meet the following criteria, we want to work with you:

1. **Proactive and Independent:** Embrace the freedom to control your own working hours and enjoy the benefits of flexible schedules.
2. **Fully Remote:** Escape the confines of a traditional office setting and thrive in a fully remote work environment.
3. **Ownership and Involvement:** Crave a sense of involvement and autonomy, where your ideas and contributions are valued and recognized.
4. **Strong Entrepreneurial Spirit:** High-energy, possess an adventurous and startup mindset, unafraid of embracing unknown challenges.
5. **Passion for the International Product:** Fuel your ambition by working on projects that transcend borders and embrace the opportunity to collaborate with teams across different parts of the world.

If you are driven, hard-working, and ready to make a significant impact, we would love to hear from you. Join our team and embark on an exciting journey of innovation and growth!

**APPLY NOW:** **https://linktr.ee/growaha**

# **Job Description**

As a Senior Mobile App Engineer, you'll play a critical role in designing, developing, and maintaining top-tier mobile applications for iOS and Android platforms. We're seeking an innovative thinker and experienced developer passionate about creating exceptional user experiences and high-performing applications.

### **Your Journey as a Senior Mobile App Engineer**

1. We focus primarily on iOS and Android for our mobile app development. While we prefer candidates with prior experience in iOS and/or Android app development, we're open to individuals with strong experience in other programming languages such as Swift, Objective-C, Java, or Kotlin.
2. Your role will involve using Xcode for iOS development and Android development environment. You'll work on the front-end mobile app development, closely interacting with our back-end frameworks to create seamless and efficient applications.

### **What You Bring**

- Bachelor's degree in information technology, computer engineering, electrical engineering, or related fields.
- A minimum of two years of professional experience or internships in mobile app development.
- Proficiency with Swift, Objective-C, Java, and Kotlin.
- Familiarity with Xcode for iOS development and the Android development environment.
- Experience in front-end mobile app development, particularly in interactions with back-end frameworks.
- Understanding of mobile application design patterns and User Interface (UI) API design.

**Extra Credentials**

- At least two years of experience in iOS and/or Android app development, with a portfolio of apps published on the App Store or Google Play.

By joining our team, you will have the unique opportunity to be part of a fast-growing tech company. You'll be working with cutting-edge technologies and tools, alongside a team of talented and passionate professionals dedicated to creating top-tier mobile applications. You'll be challenged, inspired, and you'll grow your career as you contribute to our mission.

### Additional Qualifications

We are seeking individuals who possess the following qualifications:

1. **Self-Motivation and Ownership:** Demonstrate self-motivation, a passion for continuous learning, and the ability to manage your own work effectively.
2. **User-Centric Mindset:** Show a strong desire to meet user needs and a relentless pursuit of achievement and excellence.
3. **Adaptability and Quick Learning:** Exhibit a customer-oriented approach, with the ability to quickly learn new skills and adapt to unfamiliar domains.
4. **Collaborative Spirit:** Display a willingness to actively participate in the team environment and collaborate effectively with diverse team members.

### Competitive Compensation

We offer competitive salary levels; details can be found at [[linktr.ee/growaha](https://linktr.ee/growaha)](https://linktr.ee/growaha). Our salary structure includes flexible working hours, a fully remote setup, and monthly performance-based raises, bonuses, and rewards. 

### This Job Offers You

When you join our team, you can expect:

1. **Flexible and Independent Remote Work:** Enjoy the freedom of flexible working hours and the ability to work remotely.
2. **Performance-Based Rewards:** Receive rewards and bonuses based on your performance and contributions.
3. **Driven and Talented Co-workers:** Collaborate with a group of driven, creative, and multi-talented colleagues who share a deep passion for startups.
4. **Ownership and Impact:** Take direct ownership of your role and responsibilities, making a meaningful impact in our innovative culture.
5. **Learn to Solve Challenging Issues:** Work closely with teams dedicated to creating solutions for some of the most relevant and challenging issues.
6. **Positive Work Environment:** Thrive in a work environment built on trust, accountability, collaboration, curiosity, fearlessness, kindness, and respect.

Please review our **Pre-Interview Info at [[linktr.ee/growaha](https://linktr.ee/growaha)](https://linktr.ee/growaha)** before applying.

Ready to join our team? **Apply now at [[linktr.ee/growaha](https://linktr.ee/growaha)](https://linktr.ee/growaha)**.

gh_bba8244074c7ec5ca98c3890.title: [São Paulo/SP] JAVA Developer na Qintess
gh_bba8244074c7ec5ca98c3890.description:
Empresa
Venha fazer parte do time de Inovação Qintess, uma das maiores integradoras digitais do Brasil e uma as empresas de TI que mais crescem no País. Com 25 anos no mercado, multinacional brasileira com presença global, com 21 escritórios em 5 países.
Estratégia, tecnologia e design innovation conectadas por um mindset ousado. Damos suporte às organizações no movimento ágil que o mundo atual exige.

Descrição da vaga
Profissional para atuar em squad utilizando a metodologia ágil em projeto de melhoria contínua no cliente, que é o maior banco de investimentos da América Latina.

Posição
Desenvolvedor Pleno / Sênior

Tipo de contratação
CLT

Requisitos
• Java, Spring Boot, Mensageria e REST/SOAP
• Conhecimentos em Design Patterns

Desejável
• AWS cloud: EC2, ELB, S3, CloudWatch, Route53, API Gateway, Beanstalk e Lambda
• Testes Unitários (JUnits), Jenkins, Docker, Kubernetes e arquitetura de microsserviços
• Kotlin


Benefícios
• Plano de saúde Amil Apto
• Convênio Odontológico
• Seguro de vida
• VR de R$ 440,00
• Auxílio creche
• Convenio Farmácia

Contato
Por favor envie um email para leandro.renzi@qintess.com com seu CV anexado - enviar no assunto: [VAGA JAVA] [Seu nome completo]

Alocação:
Home Office (após o período de pandemia, será discutida a possibilidade de atuação in loco)
Local
Avenida Brigadeiro Faria Lima

##Labels

experiência/senior
